subcodes.first_line: The Divine Lote-Tree doth make mention of its branches, and giveth them glad tidings of its tender mercies and favors, and beareth witness unto them of that which His Most Exalted Pen hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان السدره تذکر افنانها و تبشرها بعنایتها و الطافها و تشهد لها بما شهد قلمه الاعلی
